name: Normanton

locations.address:
Pear Tree Enquiry Office,
Pear Tree Section,
Pear Tree Road,
Derby,

description:
This Safer Neighbourhood area covers the Normanton area. It belongs to the Derby West policing section.

The Normanton neighbourhood is a well established, busy, thriving residential and commercial area located within the inner Derby city centre, enriched with its diverse population.
